title: Clothing Vouchers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Clothing Vouchers 18 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION CLOTHING VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Clothing vouchers supplied to individuals and families in neede every 90 days 364 9th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Low income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Email (503) 325-1400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an emergency food pantry, clothing vouchers, laundry vouchers, shower vouchers, a hygiene closet, assistance with identification cards and birth certificates, and bus passes with transportation to job interviews. 535 E River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 592-6139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEWMAN UNITED METHODIST CHURCH SINGLE PARENT MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited, one time basic needs assistance. Assistance may include clothing, furniture, linens, towels and blankets, kitchenware (dishes, pots, pans, glasses, etc.), diapers and wipes, and personal hygiene supplies. One time limited assistance with utility payments such as telephone, water, electric, and gas. All payments are made directly to the vendor, and assistance is not guaranteed. The amount of assistance is on a case-by-case basis and current funding availability. 132 NE B Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Single parents with minor children Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-1pm Email (541) 479-5369 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with used clothing and toys. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and toys. Clothing vouchers are available. 564 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing Vouchers: Women and children Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 476-3344 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION FURNITURE STORE THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Roseburg Rescue Mission operates a thrift and furniture store to provide a work program; items are supplied via vouchers for clients and are sold to the general public. Donations of clothing, furniture, and household items are welcome. 806 SE Pine Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Vouchers are for Rescue Mission guests only Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Roseburg Rescue Mission operates a thrift and furniture store to provide a work program; items are supplied via vouchers for clients and are sold to the general public. Donations of clothing, furniture, and household items are welcome. 738 SE Pine Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Vouchers are for Rescue Mission guests only Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION BAKER CITY SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a voucher for furniture and household items once in a 12 month period and a clothing voucher once in a 6 month period. Vouchers dependent on availability. 2505 Broadway Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Friday 1:30pm-4pm (541) 523-5853 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION COOS BAY EMERGENCY PERSONAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, clothing, and clothing vouchers to individuals in urgent situations (fire, flood, etc.). 1155 Flanagan Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Individuals and households with urgent needs Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-11am (541) 888-5202 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION PENDLETON CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vouchers for clothing and household goods to be redeemed in the Salvation Army Thrift Store. Families needing assistance can request vouchers on a case-by-case basis. 150 SE Emigrant Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Days and hours vary based on availability of volunteers (541) 276-3369 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ROSEBURG CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing vouchers once every 12 months for children and adults. Vouchers are also provided for household items. 3130 NE Stephens Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Clothing vouchers: Unrestricted Household items vouchers: For those that have had fires or first time getting into a place after being homeless. Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-noon Clothing vouchers: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon Household vouchers: Appointment only Email (541) 672-6581 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND CLOTHING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a seasonal clothing rack with slightly used coats and clothing. Offers $25 clothing vouchers to the local store, SuperThrift (one time per family per year). Also offers socks, underwear, blankets, and pillows when available. 950 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Clothing: Men, women, and children in need of clothing to protect against the cold Clothing Vouchers: Age 18 and older; one per year, per family Hours: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 389-6643 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated clothing and household items. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Clothing Vouchers: Thursday/Friday 10am-1pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-2pm Email (541) 779-3648 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day center with laundry, showers, internet access, mail services, clothing vouchers, on-site clothing, and hygiene supplies. Assistance in obtaining identification documents. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 and pregnant women (proof of pregnancy required) who are experiencing homelessness Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers limited emergency assistance with electric and water bills. Provides vouchers for clothing, household items, and furniture at the St. Vincent de Paul thrift store, and a food pantry is also available. Limited assistance for eyeglasses and bus passes for work or medical appointments only. Financial assistance is available once every 18 months. 435 SE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Must have a shut off notice for utility assistance (12 or 5 day) All other services: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry and Utilities: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Thrift store: Monday-Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (503) 472-6216 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL REDMOND CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes. Home deliveries for food provided for people in some instances. Provides rent, mortgage, and utility assistance (water, electric, propane, and heat) no more than once per year. Provides other financial assistance depending on specific needs. Individuals and families can receive vouchers for clothing, outdoor living gear, and household goods. 651 SW Veterans Way Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Income no higher than 200% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Food Pantry: Wednesday/Thursday 10am-1:30pm, Tuesday 2pm-5:30pm Social Services: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Email (541) 923-5264 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UPPER ROGUE COMMUNITY CENTER URCC THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store provides a resource for clothing, household items, books and games, bedding, and other items donated by community members at a low cost. Also provides clothing vouchers and accepts donations. 22465 Highway 62 Shady Cove, OR 97539 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Clothing Vouchers: Wednesday 9am-1pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-2:30pmpm Email (541) 299-8198 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION CLOTHING VOUCHERS GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE ILLINOIS VALLEY FAMILY COALITION BASIC NEEDS NEWMAN UNITED METHODIST CHURCH SINGLE PARENT MINISTRY REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION BAKER CITY SOCIAL SERVICES SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION COOS BAY EMERGENCY PERSONAL SERVICES SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION PENDLETON CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ROSEBURG CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND CLOTHING ASSISTANCE ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD THRIFT STORE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE ST VINCENT DE PAUL REDMOND CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND SOCIAL SERVICES UPPER ROGUE COMMUNITY CENTER URCC THRIFT STORE
